items.content: Grab the Dungeon Cell Key
Run past the Asylum Demon boss or kill him to get the Demon's Great Hammer
Grab your sword and shield
Remember about the boulder!
Talk to the Asylum knight to get the Estus Flask and Undead Asylum F2 East Key
Unlock the gate leading to bonfire
If you choose a magic class then grab your catalyst or Pyromancy Flame
Kill the Asylum Demon boss if you haven't already, remembering to do a two-handed drop attack at the start
Continue on to Firelink Shrine, grabbing the soul on the left on the way up to the nest
Talk to the Crestfallen Warrior
Talk to Petrus of Thorolund to get the Copper Coin and optionally join the Way of White covenant
Pick up the souls, Humanity, Firebombs, Homeward Bones, Morning Star, Talisman, Cracked Red Eye Orbs and Lloyd's Talismans around the shrine
Run around the graveyard and pick up the souls, Zweihander, Winged Spear, Caduceus Round Shield and the Binoculars
Level up with all your soft souls and then head down to New Londo Ruins to talk to Rickert of Vinheim and pick up the souls, Estoc and Transient Curses
Suicide run in to the ruins to get the Fire Keeper Soul
Talk to Anastacia of Astora to reinforce your Estus Flask
Head to the Valley Of Drakes and suicide run to the Undead Dragon to grab the soul on the right first, then Astora's Straight Sword and the Dragon Crest Shield
If you died return to the dragon and then go down the valley and take the elevator up to the Darkroot Basin bonfire
Kill the Black Knight to get the Blue Titanite Chunk and the Grass Crest Shield
Go up the basin and pick up the Hunter Set, Longbow and arrows, and quickly kill the Crystal Lizard
Keep going up to Undead Parish, light the bonfire above Andre the Blacksmith, and use the elevator shortcut back to the shrine
Pick up the Undead Asylum F2 West Key from the roof and take a quick return flight back to Undead Asylum to get the Rusted Iron Ring
Continue up to Undead Burg, picking up the souls and Ring Of Sacrifice from the arches under the aqueduct on the way
Remember about the Dragon and the archer!
Optionally kill the Undead Merchant to get the Uchigatana, Residence Key, Orange Guidance Soapstone and Humanity
Or keep him alive and buy the useful stuff from him

children.content: Orange Guidance Soapstone @ 100 souls
Residence Key @ 1,000 souls
Bottomless Box @ 1,000 souls
Repairbox @ 3,000 souls
Some Standard Arrows @ 10 souls each
Lloyd's Talismans for Mimics later on @ 500 souls each

items.content: Pick up the souls, Throwing Knives, Light Crossbow and bolts, Rubbish, Humanity from around the first part of the burg
Open the door below the first archer to get the Wooden Shield
Light the bonfire
Pick up the Black Firebombs and Gold Pine Resin
Remember about the second archer in the tower!
Kill the Black Knight and get the Titanite Chunk and Blue Tearstone Ring
Watch out for the barrel!
Quickly kill the Crystal Lizard under the barrels while going up the tower to get the Twinkling Titanite
Go through the fog gate and go up the ladder to take out the two archers
Kill the Taurus Demon boss, remembering to do a two-handed drop attack at the start
Optionally do some jolly co-op to get some humanity and souls. You should be level 5-10 to get summoned
Pick up the soul behind the crate in the tower
Talk to Solaire, answering Yes to his questions to get the White Sign Soapstone. Praise the Sun!

children.content: If you won't need to summon him later you can kill him to get his Sunlight Straight Sword, Iron and Sun Set, Sunlight Shield and Sunlight Talisman

items.content: Try not to get burned alive by the Hellkite Wyvern as you cross to the middle of the bridge and head down the stairs
Kick the ladder to open the shortcut back to the bonfire
Go below the bridge and use your bow to attack the wyvern's tail to get the Drake Sword
Go back up on the bridge and make a run for the far side when the wyvern lands
Light the Warrior of Sunlight bonfire, optionally join the covenant if you have enough faith, and then open the Undead Parish gate
Pick up the souls and the Claymore on the bridge
Continue on to Undead Parish
Kill the Black Knight up in the tower to get the Titanite Chunk
Kill the Mecha Boar
Get the Mystery Key that you will soon need to free Knight Lautrec and grab the soul from the beam
Kill the Undead Knight to get the Knight Shield
Get the Basement Key to unlock the Hellkite Bridge door, pull the lever to open the gate and get the Halberd
Rest at the bonfire above Andre the Blacksmith
Learn the Hurrah gesture from Andre and buy useful stuff from him

children.content: Repairbox @ 2,000 souls
Weapon Smithbox @ 2,000 souls
Armor Smithbox @ 2,000 souls
Crest of Artorias @ 20,000 souls
Upgrade your weapons

items.content: Talk to Siegmeyer of Catarina outside the gate to Sen's Fortress
Kill the Berenike Knight and get the Firekeeper Soul
Optionally make a return trip to Firelink Shrine and talk to Anastacia of Astora to reinforce your Estus Flask
Kill the Channeler and all the zombies
Pick up the soul, Humanity and free Lautrec from his cell
Kill the Bell Gargoyles

children.content: You can summon Solaire just outside the fog gate
You can also summon Lautrec from the ledge after the first ladder to the fog gate if you rescued him and went to talk to him at Firelink Shrine
Cut off the tail of the first gargoyle to get the Gargoyle Tail Axe

items.content: Ring the bell
Talk to Oswald of Carim, learn the Well! What Is It! gesture and buy useful stuff from him

children.content: Purging Stones @ 3,000 souls each for The Depths later on
Indictment @ 200 souls
Book of the Guilty @ 1,000 souls
Karmic Justice Miracle @ 40,000 souls
Bloodbite Ring @ 10,000 souls
Poisonbite Ring @ 15,000 souls

items.content: Optionally do some jolly co-op to get some humanity and souls. You should be level 15-25 to get summoned
Head back to the Hellkite Bridge and unlock the basement door and head down to the Lower Undead Burg
Open the shortcut to the Undead Burg
Use the Residence Key to free Griggs of Vinheim from the house and pick up the Sorcerer Set and Sorcerer's Catalyst
Pick up the Twin Humanities, Mail Breaker, Thief Set, Target Shield and soul from around the burg
Kill the Capra Demon to get the Key to Depths
Optionally do some jolly co-op to get some humanity and souls. You should be level 20-30 to get summoned
Head down the stairs and up the left tower to the Female Undead Merchant and buy useful stuff from her

children.content: Purple Moss Clumps @ 500 souls each for Blighttown later on
Blooming Purple Moss Clumps @ 1,000 souls each for Blighttown later on
Transient Curses @ 4,000 souls each for New Londo Ruins later on
Homeward Bones @ 800 souls each

items.content: Open the shortcut back to Firelink Shrine
Head down to the shrine and talk to Griggs of Vinheim, answering Yes to his question and buy any sorceries you need from him
Talk to the Crestfallen Warrior
Talk to Lautrec to receive a Sunlight Medal
Optionally kill Lautrec if you want to keep the shrine Firekeeper alive and don't need his armor but want the Ring of Favor and Protection
Head back up to the aqueduct, go down the tower and across to the other tower that leads to The Depths
Kill the first Butcher and get the Large Ember from the chest
Free Laurentius of the Great Swamp by rolling in to the barrels and talk to him
Kill the second Butcher
Remember about the slime above the first soul!
Light the bonfire
Head back up to the butcher area, drop down the hole behind his table, get the Spider Shield, kill the Giant Rat, get the Sewer Chamber Key and soul
On the upper level kill the Channeler, and pick up the Large Titanite Shard and Greataxe
Either slide, drop or walk down to the lower level and beward the Basilisks!
On the lower level get the Ring of the Evil Eye and Humanity
Open up the shortcut back to the bonfire and if you're not already in human form go to the bonfire and reverse hollowing
Go back down and get Knight Kirk to invade and then kill him
Head down to the boss fog gate, picking up the Heavy Crossbow and bolts on the way
Kill the Gaping Dragon to get the Blighttown Key

children.content: You can summon Solaire just above the fog gate
You can also summon Lautrec using the summon sign on the other side of the pillar from Solaire
Cut off the tail of the dragon to get the Dragon King Great Axe
Pick up the Warrior Set when you've killed it

items.content: Optionally do some jolly co-op to get some humanity and souls. You should be level 25-35 to get summoned
Talk to Domhnall of Zena, learn the Joy gesture and buy any armor, arrows etc. that you need
Make sure you have some Purple Moss Clumps and Blooming Purple Moss Clumps, if not run back to the Female Undead Merchant and buy some
Open the door to Blighttown and head down the ladder
Take it slowly. Be wary of Blowdart Snipers!
Make a running jump to get the Iaito, aim for the post
Light the first bonfire
Go down below where the Iaito was to get the Blooming Purple Moss Clumps and walk over the swaying bridge to get the Humanity and then go back up to the bonfire
Continue on past the bonfire and remember about the collapsing floor trap beside the soul!
Go up to get the Shadow Set
Move on to the next section remembering about the Blowdart Sniper perched on a high ledge
Go down the longest ladder in this section and get rid of the Blowdart Sniper and grab the Eagle Shield
Go back up to snipe the Parasitic Wall Hugger with your bow and go down to get the Power Within pyromancy spell
Head through the gap in the wall and down the ladder to the fog gate
Double back and fall down to grab the Whip
Fall down again and continue down the walkways towards the second bonfire, remembering about the Blowdart Sniper along the way
Get the Wanderer Set and the Falchion from beside the sniper
Put on the Rusted Iron Ring before you get to the bottom and make a run for the bonfire
Light the second bonfire and get the Dragon Scale from the chest in the bonfire tunnel
Run around the swamp to get the Pyromancer Set, Poison Mist pyromancy spell, the Large Titanite Shards, Server and souls
Take a quick detour up the branch towards The Great Hollow to get the Plank Shield on the corpse and the Twin Humanities behind the illusory wall
Kill the boulder throwing Infested Barbarians to get the Great Club
Optionally farm the Giant Leeches for Large Titanite Shards and Green Titanite Shards
Go up on the wheel, go up two ladders and then run around the ledge to kill the Blowdart Snipers
Slide down the ladder, kill the Dogs and pick up the Fire Keeper Soul
Return to the bonfire and if you're not human then reverse hollowing and kill Maneater Mildred when she invades to get the Butcher Knife and some Humanity
Kill Chaos Witch Quelaag

children.content: You can summon Maneater Mildred from beside the fog gate if you killed her

items.content: Ring the second bell
Go down and hit the illusory wall and talk to Eingyi, answering Yes to his question so he moves to the side. Reload your game if you answered No and try again

children.content: If you want to buy the Poison Mist or Toxic Mist pyromancy spells then you need to get infested with an Egg Head first
If your intelligence is 11 or above he will give you a Pyromancy Flame
He will upgrade your Pyromancy Flame

items.content: Talk to The Ancient Spider Queen and optionally join the Chaos Servant covenant

children.content: If you joined the convenant then feed her 30 Humanity to open up the shortcut to Lost Izalith

items.content: Reinforce your Estus Flask
Light this bonfire and then return to the previous bonfire
Optionally do some jolly co-op to get some humanity and souls. You should be level 25-40 to get summoned
Talk to Quelana of Izalith if she is there to upgrade your Pyromancy Flame or buy some Pyromancy spells
Go up on the wheel again and at the top of first ladder cross That Fucking Branch to get the Crimson Set, Tin Banishment Catalyst and Remedy sorcery
Keep going up to the top and get the Key to New Londo Ruins
Go out to the Valley of Drakes and kill the Undead Dragon with your bow or spells
Return to Firelink Shrine
If you didn't kill Lautrec earlier pick up the Dingy Set and Black Eye Orb from where Anastacia of Astora was sitting
Talk to the various people now at the shrine

children.content: Crestfallen Warrior
Griggs of Vinheim to learn sorceries if your intelligence is 10 or over
Laurentius of the Great Swamp to get a Pyromancy Flame if you need one and to upgrade it
Petrus of Thorolund to buy any miracles you need
Reah of Thorolund, Vince of Thorolund and Nico of Thorolund
Kingseeker Frampt if you want to trade some titanite or items

items.content: Head to the Undead Parish and rest at the bonfire above Andre
Give the Large Ember to Andre the Blacksmith and upgrade your weapons
Kill the Titanite Demon to get a Demon Titanite
Head in to Darkroot Garden, rest at the bonfire behind the illusory wall and open the door using the Crest of Artorias but do not go through it
Go down to Darkroot Basin
Head up to the tower and kill Havel the Rock to get Havel's Ring
Make sure you are wearing the Rusted Iron Ring
Kill the Crystal Golems and then the Hydra to get the Dragon Scale and Dusk Crown Ring
Pick up the Knight Set
Kill the Golden Crystal Golem, reloading your game if it's not there
Talk to Dusk of Oolacile, answering Yes to her question
Go back to where the Hydra fight happened and summon Dusk of Oolacile, learn her Proper Bow gesture and buy any sorceries you need or the catalyst
Go back to where you killed the Golden Crystal Golem and pick up the Antiquated Set
Climb up the ladder beside the waterfall and then climb the second ladder to the bridge
Head across the bridge in to Darkroot Garden
Kill the three Giant Cats
Draw out the Mushroom People and get the Enchanted Ember from the chest
Head deeper in to the forest to the broken tower beside the bridge and get the Stone Knight Set from the chest behind the tower
Go across the bridge and talk to Alvina of the Darkroot Wood and optionally join the Forest Hunter covenant to get the Cat Covenant Ring
If you joined the covenant talk to Shiva of the East so that you can buy stuff from him later
If you didn't join the covenant

children.content: Kill Pharis to get the Black Bow of Pharis and Pharis' Hat
Clear out the rest of the enemies in this section of the forest

items.content: Go to the lower section of the forest and kill all the Ents and pick up the Eastern Set
Return to the bonfire through the door you opened earlier with the Crest of Artorias
Go through the gap in the wall to the right of the door and head down, remembering that when you pick up the soul on the right it will spawn three Ents
After the fog gate hit the tree on the right to open up a passage to a secret area
Kill the Great Stone Knight in the main area first, then the one in the tower and pick up the Wolf Ring
Head back out of the secret area and kill the other Great Stone Knights and Ents that spawn
Pick up the Elite Knight Set
Pick up the Partizan from the alcove on the left wall
Kill the Moonlight Butterfly

children.content: You can summon Witch Beatrice at the bottom of the tower leading to the boss
After the fight head up the tower to get the Watchtower Basement Key, Divine Ember and Homeward Bone

items.content: Return to the bonfire
Go back through the forest and kill Great Grey Wolf Sif to get the Covenant of Artorias and remember to pick up the Hornet Ring
Optionally do some jolly co-op to get some humanity and souls. You should be level 15-25 for the Butterfly and 20-50 for Sif, though summons for both are rare
Return to Andre and give him the Divine Ember and upgrade your weapon if needed
Return to Firelink Shrine
Reah and her companions should be gone. If Petrus is there talk to him and then kill him now if you don't want him to kill Reah later. If he's not then come back later
Make a quick run down to New Londo Ruins, give the Enchanted Ember to Blacksmith Rickert of Vinheim and upgrade your weapons if needed
If you're a member of the Forest Hunter covenant and talked to Shiva earlier then optionally do a quick run to Blighttown to talk to him

children.content: Learn the Look Skyward gesture
Buy weapons or the East Wood Grain Ring from him
If you've bought all you need then you can now kill him and his bodyguard to get their gear but you will be kicked out of the covenant
If you fail to kill him then they will return to the forest where you first met them and you can kill them there

items.content: Head back to the Undead Parish and rest at the bonfire above Andre
Cross the bridge to Sen's Fortress
Cross the first swinging blade walkway, remembering about the Serpent Mage trying to knock you off
Take out the Serpent Mage with your bow before crossing the second walkway and remember about the arrow trap at the end
Get the Large Titanite Shards from the chest
Cross the next walkway and remember about the boulder and the Serpent Soldier at the end
Run halfway to the fog gate, wait for a boulder and then run to the top and get the Ring Of Steel Protection from the chest
Go back to the fog gate and remember about the reverse arrow trap in the next room
Wait for a boulder and then run up and jump off to the left just before the broken pillar on to a wooden platform
Pick up the Black Sorcerer Set and Hush sorcery
Run up to the boulder switch, turn it so that it breaks the wall, then turn it so that it starts filling the hole
Pick up the Shotel and talk to Siegmeyer of Catarina
Free Big Hat Logan
Return to the boulder switch and point it outside
Run down to the hole the boulder fills, get the Covetous Gold Serpent Ring and use a Lloyd's Talisman on the mimic chest to get the Lightning Spear
Use the elevator to get back to the boulder switch room and continue through the corridor, remembering about the multi arrow trap
Cross the next swinging blade walkway, kill the Serpent Soldiers and get the Large Titanite Shards
Cross the last swinging blade walkway, remembering about the Serpent Mage at the start and the arrow traps at the end
Go through the fog gate and wait for a gap in the fire and light the first bonfire
Kill the fire bomb giant
Jump across the gap in the walkway and buy useful stuff from the Crestfallen Merchant

children.content: Titanite Shards @ 1,000 souls each
Large Titanite Shards @ 4,000 souls each
Green Titanite Shard @ 5,000 souls each
Thunder Stoneplate Ring @ 15,000 souls
Spell Stoneplate Ring @ 15,000 souls

items.content: Go down the stairs below the merchant and get the Cage Key
Get the Large Titanite Shards, Sniper Crossbow, bolts and Flame Stoneplate Ring from around the fortress
Kill Ricard the Archer to get his Rapier and get the Divine Blessing and Rare Ring of Sacrifice in the tower above him
Open the cage shortcut using the Cage Key and quickly run in and out of the cage to send it down
Kill the Iron Golem to open up the portal to Anor Londo

children.content: You can summon Iron Knight Tarkus in the tower across from the fog gate

items.content: Optionally do some jolly co-op to get some humanity and souls. You should be level 40-50 to get summoned
Put on the Rusted Iron Ring, go down in the cage elevator and drop down on to the ledge with the serpents and kill them
Kill the two Titanite Demons in the first area to get Demon Titanites and the Scythe
Kill the other two Titanite Demons to get more Demon Titanites
Climb the ladder out of the pit, hit the illusory wall, climb the second ladder and kill the giant that opened the gate to get a Titanite Chunk
Return to the wooden platform you jump on to during the boulder run and drop down the other side to get the Slumbering Dragoncrest Ring
Return to the bonfire and go up and use the portal to Anor Londo
Run past the Sentinels, light the bonfire, talk to Darkmoon Knightess and reinforce your Estus Flask if you need to
Kill the two Sentinels you ran past and open the chest to get a Demon Titanite
Cross the courtyard and kill the other two, using a Lloyd's Talisman on the right mimic chest to get the Crystal Halberd and opening the left chest to get a Twinkling Titanite
Go down the elevator and kill the Lightning Gargoyle
Get the Demon Titanite from the chest below and walk up the beams in to the chapel
Walk along the rafters and remember to hit the chain of the chandelier
Jump down onto the platform with the statues and roll through the pillars on the other side of the room. Kill the Painting Guardian and open the chest to get the Divine Blessing.
Turn the bridge lever once in an anti-clockwise direction to lower the platform and kill the second Lightning Gargoyle
Go up the giant staircase and kill the Sentinels and Bat Wing Demons
Go up the buttress and kill the right Silver Knight Archer, remembering not to use your shield but dodge towards him instead until he starts meleeing
If you have the balls go and kill the second archer to get the Soul of a Hero
Drop down on to the platform after the first archer and enter the left door to light the bonfire. Congratulate yourself!
Talk to Solaire
Cross the hallway and get the Sunlight Medals from the chest
Go down the corridor and through the left door and hit the illusory wall
Go down in to the basement and open the four chests that sit together to get Havel's Set, Havel's Greatshield and the Dragon Tooth
Use a Lloyd's Talisman on the single mimic chest to get the Occult Club
Go up the stairs and use Lloyd's Talismans on the two mimic chests to get the Silver Coins and the Gold Coin
Use ranged attacks to kill the Titanite Demon from above
Kill the Silver Knight Archer at the end of the corridor
Coming from the dead archer go through the right door and up to the roof, remembering about the Silver Knight behind the door
Kill the archer on the right but then head down the stairs on the left to talk to Siegmeyer
Bait each of the four Silver Knights one at a time from the room up on to the roof to kill them
Talk to Siegmeyer again to get the Tiny Being's Ring
Open the chest in the room to get the two Demon Titanites
Unlock the door, go back up the roof and go down the stairs where the archer was
Go across the corridor and kill the two Silver Knights, get the Silver Knight Set from the two chests and unlock the shortcut back to the bonfire
Go back upstairs and keep going up to top of the large hall, go around the walkway and down to the Giant Blacksmith
Get the Hawk Ring from the chest behind him
Talk to him and buy useful stuff from him

children.content: Titanite Shards @ 800 souls each
Large Titanite Shards @ 3,800 souls each
Green Titanite Shard @ 4,800 souls each
Twinkling Titanite @ 8,000 souls each
Create any Boss Soul Weapons you need
Create any lightning weapons you need
Upgrade your other weapons

items.content: Open the gate leading back to the giant staircase and pick up the Titanite Chunk
Go back upstairs and drop out the broken window to get the Dragonslayer Greatbow
Go back to the large hall and open the large main door
Return to the bonfire if you need to
Kill Ornstein and Smough

children.content: You can summon Solaire from the steps near the archer in the large hall
The best place to summon other players for this fight is the second bonfire in the room after the archers
If you want to get Smough's Set from Domhnhall of Zena or want to make Smough's Hammer then kill Ornstein first
If you want to get Ornstein's Set from Domhnhall of Zena or want the Leo Ring or want to make the Dragon-Slayer Spear then kill Smough first

items.content: Go up one the screw elevators and light the bonfire
Talk to Princess Gwynevere, get the Lordvessel and optionally join the Princess Guard covenant
Optionally do some jolly co-op to get some humanity and souls. You should be level 40-50 to get summoned
If you didn't kill Lautrec earlier then return to the large hall and use the the Black Eye Orb to invade his world and kill him

children.content: You will get the Ring of Favor and Protection, Anastacia of Astora's soul, a Souvenir of Reprisal and five Humanity
When you return to Firelink Shrine you can revive Anastacia of Astora with her soul or you can choose to use it to reinforce your Estus Flask
After killing him you can get the Favor Set from the balcony above where you fought Ornstein and Smough

items.content: Now that we can fast travel, warp back to Firelink Shrine
Talk to the various people now at the shrine

children.content: Griggs of Vinheim and the recently freed Big Hat Logan
Talk to Siegmeyer and answer Yes to his question to get the Emit Force miracle
Do not speak to Frampt if you want to join the Darkwraith covenant later
Talk to Domhnall of Zena under the aqueduct to buy any of the boss armor you need

items.content: Take a flight back to Undead Asylum
Remember about the collapsing floor!
Kill the Stray Demon to get a Titanite Slab
Kill the Black Knight near your starting cell to get a Red Titanite Chunk and pick up the Peculiar Doll
Kill the Black Knight near where you picked up your first weapon to get another Red Titanite Chunk
Kill the now hollow Elite Knight to get the Crest Shield
Warp back to Firelink Shrine
Run up to the Female Undead Merchant in the aqueduct and buy all the Transient Curses she has and equip them
Go down to New Londo Ruins
On your way to the wooden bridges get ready to be attacked by the Crestfallen Warrior
Use one of your Transient Curses and keep them visible on your HUD so that you know when it expires
Make your way through the first part of the ruins picking up the Parrying Dagger and killing the Banshee to get the two Transient Curses
Go through the fog gate
Kick the ladder to relase it and go down and kill the two Ghosts to stop them attacking you from below
Approach the house and kill the Ghosts that come out of the water before entering house
Go up the ladder in the fireplace and talk to Ingward to get the Key to the Seal and buy more Transient Curses if you need them
Go downstairs and get the Cursebite Ring from the ledge
Go out the other door and get Green Titanite Shard, Humanity and jump to the roof to get the Rare Ring of Sacrifice
Head to the tower, open the door with the Key to the Seal and push the lever clockwise to drain the water
Go upstairs in the tower and get the Composite Bow and large arrows
Pull the lever and go down the elevator to the Valley of Drakes entrance
Kill the Drakes, get the Brigand Armor Set and Spider Shield, and go up the ladder to get the Red Tearstone Ring
Continue through the buildings and through the fog gate
Clear out the Darkwraith Knights and Mass of Souls so you can get the Humanity and trigger the elevator shortcut to the beginning of the ruins
Go out the smaller side door and up to open the chest with the Very Large Ember
Go back down and out the larger door and pick up the souls and six Cracked Red Eye Orbs
Hit the illusory wall and open the chest to get a Titanite Chunk
Clear out the Darkwraith Knights and Mass of Souls and get the Titanite Chunk from the chest
Put on the Covenant of Artorias ring
Kill the Four Kings

children.content: You can summon Witch Beatrice from behind the pillar if you previously summoned her for the Moonlight Butterfly fight

items.content: Optionally do some jolly co-op to get some humanity and souls. You should be level 60-75 to get summoned
Warp to Undead Parish and give the Very Large Ember to Andre and upgrade your weapons
Warp to Firelink Shrine and go down to the Valley of Drakes to get the Witch Set and Beatrice's Catalyst
Make sure you have at least three Purple Moss Clumps and warp to the Daughter of Chaos bonfire
Go talk to Siegmeyer in the Blighttown swamp and give him the Purple Moss Clumps to get the Pierce Shield
Go up the branch and hit the illusory wall behind the chest and go in to The Great Hollow
Light and rest at the bonfire
Kill the Black Hydra to get two Dragon Scales and then get one more from the corpse to the left
Walk along the sand and get the Dragon Scale from the small dead tree
Get the Dragon Scale from the corpse on left by the water after the small dead tree
Go up the branch on the outside of the first huge tree, drop off to the right on to the hidden platform and head in to the tree to get the Great Magic Barrier miracle
Continue along the sand to the next tree, light the bonfire and optionally join the Path of the Dragon covenant
Cut off the tail of the dragon to get the Dragon Greatsword
Make sure you have some Blooming Purple Moss Clumps in case you get toxic from the Engorged Zombies
Warp to Anor Londo
Go down the elevator and turn the platform lever anti-clockwise and enter the chapel
Pick up the Great Magic Weapon sorcery, Black Iron Set, Greatsword and Black Iron Greatshield
Examine the painting to warp to the Painted World of Ariamis
Light and rest at the bonfire
Remember to use range attacks on the Engorged Zombies so you don't get toxic
Go up the stairs and on to the roof of the first building and use your bow to pull the two Crow Demons from the other tower to you so they don't ambush you later
Drop down to get the Dried Finger and then go the bottom floor of the building to get the soul
Clear out the next building, remembering about the two Zombies hanging from the ledge, and hit the rope holding the zombie to drop it down
Go upstairs, jump across the gap and get the soul and the Egg Vermifuge, slide down the ladder and get the Painting Guardian Set
Lure the Crow Demons out of the tower one by one
Go to the top of the spiral staircase to get the Red Sign Soapstone and on the way back down drop to the ledge to get the soul
Kill the Undead Dragon and then pick up the soul, Dragon Scale and the Bloodshield from the bridge
Go back to the tower, through the fog gate and open the shortcut back to the bonfire
Go down to the basement and kill the six Wheel Skeletons, making sure to pull one at a time with your bow
Grab the two souls and turn the lever to open the gate that leads to the boss
Hit the illusory wall and explore the tunnels, kill the three Wheel Skeletons, get the Annex Key and kill the Engorged Zombie to get the Fire Surge pyromancy
Leave the tunnels using the well ladder, go up the stairs to get the Ring of Sacrifice and grab the Humanity from the zombie you dropped earlier
Open the Annex door and head up the stairs
Head up on to the roof of the building to the left, kill the two Crow Demons, watch for an ambush by two more and get the Vow Of Silence miracle
Take the stairs in to the round tower and pick up the Black Set
Go to the lower section and get the Dark Ember
Break the wooden fence to get Velka's Rapier, drop down in to the building and get the Gold Coin
Return to the bonfire and reverse hollowing
Go the open area with all the spikes, wait for King Jeremiah to invade and kill him to get the Notched Whip
Pick up the souls in the area and the Acid Surge pyromancy hidden behind the wall
Go through the gate you opened earlier, walk across the bridge, watching out for the zombies and kill the Tower Knight to get the Large Titanite Shard
Reload your game before you enter the fog gate, go through and pick up the Xanthous Set that should now have appeared
Kill Crossbreed Priscilla

children.content: Cut off her tail to get Priscilla's Dagger

items.content: Optionally do some jolly co-op to get some humanity and souls. You should be level 55-60 to get summoned
Jump off the ledge to warp back to Anor Londo
Leave the chapel and turn the platform lever clockwise to return it to its normal position and go to the first Anor Londo bonfire
Warp to Undead Parish and give the Dark Ember to Andre and upgrade your weapons
Warp back to Anor Londo and head to The Duke's Archives
Kill the two Mecha Boars and rest at the bonfire
Go up the first elevator and kill the Crystal Golem to get the Broken Pendant (DLC Only)
Clear out the crystal skeletons and the Channeler and get the soul
Take the left hand side stairs and get the Twinkling Titanite from the chest
Go around to the other side and get the Twinkling Titanite from the balcony and the crystal Knight Shield from the mimic
Take the elevator up to the next level, draw out and kill the crystalline hollow, and quickly kill the Crystal Lizard on the stairs to get two Twinkling Titanites
Put on a Rare Ring of Sacrifice, go through the fog gate and let Seath the Scaleless kill you
Rest at the cell bonfire and kill the Man Serpent to get the Archive Tower Cell Key
Let yourself out of the cell, try to kill the two Man Serpents that run past then kill the four Pisacas that are chasing them
Head up the stairs and up the ladder, walk along the ledge to the left and drop down to the cell to get the Maiden Set and the White Seance Ring
Open the third cell, drop down to get the Archive Prison Extra Key and use it to open the second cell and get the soul
Kill the rest of the Pisacas at the bottom, get the Soothing Sunlight and Bountiful Sunlight miracles, and talk to Big Hat Logan
Go up the ladder, kill the two Man Serpents, turn off the alarm and get the Archive Tower Giant Door Key from the chest
Head back up to your cell and open the other door, drop down to get the soul and then drop down a couple of levels back to the alarm
Head all the way back up and open the door at the top of the ladder
Head up and kill the Channeler up on the ledge and the second one around the corner
Head to the left, spin the staircase around, go down to get the Twinkling Titanite from the chest and then head back up the stairs again
Make sure you have full health and drop down to the second spinning staircase
Go up the stairs and get the Strong Magic Shield sorcery
Spin the stairs, go down and kill the archer on the ledge, slide down the ladder and pull the lever to open the bookcase shortcut
Go in to the larger of the two rooms and get the Symbol of Avarice and the enchanted Falchion from the mimic in the far right part of the room
Open the other chests, remembering about the one behind the bookcase, to get the Channeler Set, Archive Tower Giant Cell Key and the Crystal Ember
Go to the smaller room and get the Blue Titanite Chunk from the chest
Go out through the bookcase shortcut and rest at the bonfire
Clear out the two rooms of the library, including the archer on the bookcase and the Channelers
Spin the staircase and jump off the lower steps while it's rotating to land on the top of the bookshelf and get the Avelyn crossbow from the chest
Go back through the bookcase shortcut, pull the lever in the larger room to lower the stairs, get the Prism Stones from the chest and go through the fog gate
Kill the Golden Crystal Golem and talk to Sieglinde of Catarina, answering Yes to her question
Kill the other Crystal Golems and pick up the Crystalline Set and the Blue Titanite Chunk
Head down in to the Crystal Cave
Take the first invisible path and get the Humanity
Take the next invisible path, kill the Crystal Golem, drop off to the left and double back in to the small tunnel behind you and kill the three Crystal Lizards
Turn around again and take the invisible path down to get the Blue Titanite Slab
Head back up and kill the Golden Crystal Golem and get the Blue Titanite Chunk
Go down the last invisible path and get the soul in front of the Moonlight Butterfly but be careful because it will probably attack you
Put on the Covetous Gold Serpent Ring and kill the Man-Eater Shells to get some Purging Stones and Twinkling Titanite
Kill Seath the Scaleless

children.content: You have to break the crystal before you can do damage to him
Cut off his tail to get the Moonlight Greatsword

items.content: Optionally do some jolly co-op to get some humanity and souls. You should be level 60-75+ to get summoned
Return to the bonfire, go through the bookcase shortcut and in to the small room to talk to Big Hat Logan and buy any sorceries you need

children.content: If you want Big Hat's Set then you will need to buy all of his sorceries to get him to leave and go hollow
If you only need the White Dragon Breath sorcery, his Big Hat and Tin Crystallization Catalyst you can kill him now
When he has left, go to the room where you first encountered Seath the Scaleless, kill him and then return to this room to get Big Hat's Set from the new chest

items.content: Go back up the ladder, spin the stairs, go down them and out on to the balcony, and go back in to the prison area
Go down to the bottom and use the Archive Tower Giant Cell Key to open the gate and get the Firekeeper Soul
Return to the archives, go down one floor to the second floor, go to the first archive room and use the lever to call the elevator
Go to the room where you first encountered Seath the Scaleless and get the Large Magic Ember from the chest and the soul from the balcony
Return to the bonfire, warp to Firelink Shrine, talk to Sieglinde, answering Yes to her question, and go down to reinforce your Estus Flask
Go down to New Londo Ruins, give the Large Magic Ember to Rickert and upgrade your weapons if needed
Warp to the Chamber of the Princess bonfire, give the Crystal Ember to the Giant Blacksmith and upgrade your weapons if needed
Warp to the Daughter of Chaos bonfire, go down to the Demon Ruins, rest at the first bonfire
Kill the Ceasless Discharge

children.content: Get the Gold-Hemmed Black Set to start the fight

items.content: Make sure you are human and continue down in to the ruins
Wait for Knight Kirk to invade and then kill him to get the Spiked Shield and Barbed Straight Sword
Roll down to the first platform, kill the Burrowing Rockworm guarding the bonfire and rest there
Go down the stairs and go left along the ledge to get the Large Flame Ember from the chest, remembering about the Burrowing Rockworm traps
Go back to the fog gate and if you are level two in the Chaos Servant covenant then go down to the right and open the shortcut to Lost Izalith

children.content: If you want to save Solaire then kill all the bugs to get the Sunlight Maggot and use this shortcut to talk to him

items.content: Go through the fog gate and kill the Demon Firesage

children.content: He will drop the Demon's Catalyst
Don't forget the Soul of a Brave Warrior up the stairs behind the Stone Demons

items.content: Optionally do some jolly co-op to get some humanity and souls. You should be level 55-60+ to get summoned
Go upstairs to open the shortcut back to Quelaag's Domain
Go back the way you came and go down and rest at the bonfire
Kill the Centipede Demon

children.content: Cut off his tail and then kill the tail to get Orange Charred Ring, though he will drop the ring anyway when killed
Don't forget the Green Titanite Shard in the open area around to the right

items.content: Put on the Orange Charred Ring
Optionally do some jolly co-op to get some humanity and souls. You should be level 60+ to get summoned
Leave boss area by the tunnel, rest at the bonfire and talk to Solaire if he's there
Continue in to Lost Izalith
Make your way to the first building, picking up the two souls along the way, and open the chest inside to get another soul
Run up the branch of the next building and get the Twin Humanities
Drop down to the base of the building and hit the illusory wall of the building, rest at the bonfire and make sure you are human
Continue on in to the ruins and grab the soul hidden to the left just before you go up the stairs
Go up the stairs, kill the Chaos Eater, kill the Daughter of Chaos to get the Izalith Catalyst, and wait for Knight Kirk to invade and then kill him
Kill the second Chaos Eater and open the chest to get the Chaos Fire Whip pyromancy
Go down the branch and kill all the Stone Demons
Kill the Titanite Demon to get a Demon Titanite and if you didn't open the shortcut earlier then open it now and kill the bugs to get the Sunlight Maggot
Trigger the collapsing floor by walking to the left of the alcove
Put on the Rusted Iron Ring, walk down the branch, do not talk to Siegmeyer yet but instead kill all but one of the Chaos Eaters using ranged attacks
Now talk to Siegmeyer and follow him when he jumps in to the pit and make sure he doesn't lose more than half his health while killing the remaining Chaos Eaters
Grab the soul and Green Titanite Shards and then talk to him again
Make your way through the tunnels, getting the Red Titanite Slab from the chest and then the Red Titanite Chunk after going up the stairs
Make your way back up the branches and back up to the boss fog gate
Kill the Bed of Chaos

children.content: You need to destroy the right orb first, then the left orb and then drop down in the center to kill her

items.content: Optionally do some jolly co-op to get some humanity and souls. You should be level 60-75+ to get summoned
Warp back to the Daughter of Chaos bonfire and get the Thorns Set
Go back down to the Demon Ruins, kill the Taurus Demons, and get the Chaos Flame Ember and soul from the lava
Warp to Firelink Shrine and talk to Sieglinde of Catarina
Warp to the Stone Dragon bonfire, walk along the sand to the Ash Lake bonfire and talk to Sieglinde to get a Titanite Slab
Make sure you are using a Divine weapon, warp back to Firelink Shrine and continue down in to The Catacombs
Go down to the first bonfire, kill the Undead Mage and pull the first switch
Use a ranged attack to take out the next Undead Mage
Clear out the room the Undead Mage was in and get the Lucerne from the side room
Continue clearing out this area, grabbing the soul from near the archer, head outside past the statue spike traps, push the second switch and get the soul
Cross the bridge and quickly kill the next Undead Mage
Go in to the side room to the right, fall through the floor and try to get the two Crystal Lizards while avoiding the statue spike traps
Climb up the ladder and fall through the floor again to get back to the second switch
Go back across the bridge and at the end of it drop down three times to the left, pick up the Great Scythe and push the third switch
Head outside, push the fourth switch, roll through the illusory wall and rest at the bonfire
Go across the bridge and through the fog gate, hit the broken wall, drop down and clear out the room
Continue up the steps, watch out for the giant skeleton that drops from the roof and get the Darkmoon Seance Ring from the coffin
Go out the broken wall, continue up the steps, kill the Undead Mage and climb up the ladder
Get the Tranquil Walk of Peace miracle and fall through the floor to near the start of the level
Continue all the way back across the bridges to the building with all of the coffins
Nestle in the coffin on the left just before the Titanite Demon to go to the Tomb of the Giants and optionally join the Gravelord Servant covenant
Use the coffin to get back, go down the corridor and through the broken wall, drop down through the floor and kill the Black Knight to get the White Titanite Chunk
Use ranged attacks to kill all the Wheel Skeletons and before dropping down
Go through the tunnel near where you dropped down and kill the Undead Mage to get the Skull Lantern
Climb up the two ladders and back to entrance of the building with all the coffins, go outside and drop off to the ledge where you can summon Paladin Leeroy
Drop off to the next ledge to get the Cleric Set and Mace
Kill Pinwheel

children.content: As described above you can summon Paladin Leeroy from the ledge above the area with the Wheel Skeletons
You will get the Rite of Kindling when you kill him
He will drop one of Mask of the Father, Mask of the Mother or Mask of the Child

items.content: Optionally do some jolly co-op to get some humanity and souls. You should be level 20-40 or 55-65 to get summoned
Go up the ladder and continue on the Tomb of the Giants
If you got the Sunlight Maggot then wear it otherwise put the Skull Lantern in your left hand
Slide down the coffins, climb down the ladder and rest at the bonfire
Go back up the ladder, along the ledge to the right, drop down the hole, kill all the giant skeletons and get the Large Divine Ember
Climb back out, hit the illusory wall along the ledge, climb down the ladder, kill the bone towers and Reah's bodyguards but do not talk to her
Get the White Titanite Chunk, Skull Lantern, souls and head back up the ladder
Talk to Patches the Hyena, answering No to his question and let him kick you down in to the pit
Talk to Reah to get the Replenishment miracle
Go back up and talk to Patches again, answering No to his question to get Twin Humanities
Continue past him and through the fog gate and kill the Black Knight that comes running at you
Kill the archer, grab the soul, jump down, get ready for an ambush by bone towers and grab the Covetous Silver Serpent Ring
Jump across and kill the giant skeleton and then continue up, hugging the left wall to get the Effigy Shield
Go back down to where you killed the last giant skeleton and hug the left wall around to the next bonfire and reverse hollowing
Go down the path, grab the White Titanite Chunk, go down the ladder, wait for Paladin Leeroy to invade and kill him to get Sanctus and Grant
Quickly kill the Crystal Lizard in the tunnel
Continue through the tunnel and down the ledge, clear out the Pinwheels and grab the soul and White Titanite Slab
Kill Gravelord Nito

children.content: After the fight pick up the Paladin Set, though you may need to reload your game to get it to appear

items.content: Rest at the bonfire, warp to Firelink Shrine
Drop down the hole, offer the Lord Souls, warp back to the shrine and talk to Anastacia of Astora to fully kindle the shrine bonfire
Talk to Patches, learn his Prostration gesture and buy anything you need from him

children.content: Heal miracle @ 5,000 souls
Great Heal Excerpt miracle @ 10,000 souls
Mask of the Father @ 8,000 souls
Mask of the Mother @ 8,000 souls
Mask of the Child @ 8,000 souls
You can also buy other various items and weapons

items.content: Take a flight back to Undead Asylum and trade items with Snuggly

children.content: Sunlight Maggot will give Old Witch's Ring
Sack will give Demon's Great Hammer
Skull Lantern will give Ring Of Fog
You can also get various other titanites and miscellaneous items

items.content: Go to Undead Parish and talk to Reah, learn her Prayer gesture and buy any miracles you need
Go to Andre and give him the Large Divine Ember and upgrade your weapon if needed
Go back in to the The Catacombs, drop off the first bridge on to the second, drop down the ledges, go down the spiral staircase and drop down to Blacksmith Vamos
Give him the Large Flame Ember and Chaos Flame Ember and upgrade your weapon if needed
Return to a bonfire and warp to Anor Londo
Put on the Darkmoon Seance Ring, go down the elevator and turn the platform lever anti-clockwise and rest at the bonfire
Pick up the Ring of The Sun's Firstborn and optonally join the Blade of the Dark Moon covenant
If you don't want to join the covenant then go through the fog gate and kill Dark Sun Gwyndolin

children.content: Get the Sunlight Blade miracle and Brass Set from the chests after killing her
You can now buy the Gwyndolin Moonlight Set from Domhnall of Zena
Darkmoon Knightess will now attack you if you return to the first Anor Londo bonfire and will drop a Firekeeper Soul

items.content: Remember to go back return the platform to the up position before leaving here
Optionally go and attack Gwynevere to turn Anor Londo dark and get invaded by members of the Blade of the Dark Moon covenant
If you don't have the DLC go down to New Game Plus Preparation
Go down to Darkroot Basin and examine the portal found near where you fought the Golden Crystal Golem
Rest at the bonfire and continue through the fog gate and kill the Sanctuary Guardian

children.content: Cut off the tail to get the Guardian Tail

items.content: Continue up the path to Oolacile Sanctuary, rest at the bonfire and talk to Elizabeth, answering Yes to her question
Get the Humanity from the corpse, head down to Royal Woods and clear out the Ents and the Stone Guardians from the first section
Get the Guardian Gauntlets from the tower on the right side, the Blue Titanite Slab from the chest in the center and the Guardian Leggings from the left side
Cross the bridge on the left, try not to get squashed by Kalameet, quickly kill the Crystal Lizard and watch out for the Stone Guardian that appears
Jump down and across the gap on the left and kill the Ents and the Stone Guardian
Get the Guardian Helm from the ledge, and the Guardian Armor and Gough's Great Arrows from near where the Stone Guardian was
Get the Elizabeth's Mushroom from the hidden alcove
Jump back across the gap and clear out the Ents on the left and get the Gold Coin
Kill the two Stone Giants near the tower and quickly kill the Crystal Lizard
Get the soul from behind the tower, go down on the elevator and then at the bottom grab the soul from around the corner
Go across the bridge and talk to Marvelous Chester, answering Yes to his question, and buy anything you need from him and use the elevator to open up the shortcut
Go through the fog gate and kill Artorias the Abysswalker
Reload your game and kill Lord's Blade Ciaran who should now have appeared to get the Lord's Blade Set, the Dark Silver Tracer and the Gold Tracer
Leave by the other door and in to Oolacile Township and rest at the bonfire
Go back in to Royal Woods and head down the path beside the elevator in to the valley and at the botton get the soul on the left
Continue along the valley, down the ladder, quickly kill the Crystal Lizard, piss off Black Dragon Kalameet enough that he attacks you once and return to the bonfire
Make sure you have either a Skull Lantern, Sunlight Maggot or the Cast Light sorcery
Continue down the steps and stick to the right, grabbing the souls along the way, go around the back of the building and roll down to the next ledge
Use your light source on the illusory wall on the building to the left and get the Silver Pendant from the chest
Kill everything in the other building and get the Dark Orb sorcery from the chest and the I'm Sorry carving from the Bloathead Mage on the outside ledge
Go back to the main path, cross the wooden bridge, get invaded by Marvelous Chester
Continue crossing the wooden bridge, and get the Very Good! carving from the mimic and take out the Bloathead Mage down below with ranged attacks
Go halfway down the stairs, walk across to the rooftop, and kill the Crystal Lizard. You may have to reload the game to make the Crystal Lizard appear.
Continue down and across the walkway, very carefully clear out the ground floor of the building and get the Rubbish, Dark Fog sorcery and soul
Go upstairs, use your light source on the illusory wall and get the Red Titanite Chunk from the chest
Head back across the rafters, roll down to the balcony and get the Crest Key from the mimic
Drop on to the roof from the next room and go up and across the roof to get a Twin Humanities
Drop off the roof, go across to open up the elevator shortcut and rest at the bonfire
Go back towards the colosseum, go up the stairs to the right and unlock the door using the Crest Key
Talk to Hawkeye Gough twice, answering Yes to both his questions, so that he grounds Kalameet, and buy the Hello and Thank You carvings
Go back in to Royal Woods and down to the valley and kill Kalameet

children.content: Cut off his tail to get the Obsidian Greatsword
When you kill him he will drop the Calamity Ring
When he's dead pick up the souls, the Titanite Slab from the chest underneath the waterfall and the Gough's Great Arrows from the end of the valley

items.content: Return to the colosseum and go back up to talk to Hawkeye Gough to get Gough's Greatbow
Go back down the elevator shortcut, carefully clear out the Bloatheads and then kill the Chained Prisoner to get the Helm and Leggings from the Chain Set
Call the elevator, kill the Bloathead that arrives with it and rest at the bonfire
Make sure you have your light source equipped, go down the path, quickly kill the Crystal Lizard, kill all the Bloatheads and get the Dark Bead sorcery
Continue down, walk on to the illusory floor on the left, follow the apparition and use the elevator to open a shortcut back to Royal Woods
Go back down, hit the illusory wall, save Puppy Sif from the Humanity Spirits and pick up the Cleansing Greatshield
Go back out and down to the left, kill all the Humanity Spirits and get the Black Flame pyromancy
Head back up, kill the Bloathead Mage and get the Twin Humanities
Kill the big group of Humanity Spirits and drop down to get the Help Me! carving
Drop down again, walk back up, go down the stone pillar, get the White Titanite Slab and put on the Silver Pendant
Kill Manus, Father of the Abyss

children.content: You can summon Sif, if you saved him, using the summon sign inside the boss area

items.content: Rest at the bonfire, warp to Oolacile Sanctuary and talk to Elizabeth to get three Elizabeth's Mushrooms
Warp back to Firelink Shrine
Farm some Humanity if needed and kindle all the Bonfires
If you missed any Titanites or Crystal Lizards go and get them
Visit the vendors and buy any items, miracles, sorceries and pyromancies that you will need
Upgrade any weapons you will need
Get any items you need from Snuggly
Buy any consumables you need from the various vendors, like arrows
Buy any armor sets you need from Domhnall of Zena
Kill The Ancient Spider Queen and Darkmoon Knightess to get their Firekeeper Soul and talk to Anastacia to reinforce your Estus Flask
Kill all the Blacksmiths to get their items
Kill all the other Merchants to get their drops
Return to Firelink Shrine
Drop down the hole and if you haven't already then offer the Lord Souls
Farm the Black Knights for chunks
Grab the Black Knight Set from the beam
Optionally do some jolly co-op to get some humanity and souls. You should be level 65-80+ to get summoned
Kill Gwyn Lord of Cinder

children.content: After killing him you can use the bonfire to get the good ending and the To Link The Fire achievement
Or you can leave the area to get the evil ending and the Dark Lord achievement

items.content: Congratz on completing one of the best RPGs ever made. Now go do it again!
